question.text:
다들 cGAN 과제 성공하셨나요? 저는 만들어진 사진을 보면 학습이 되는 것 같기는 한데 generator 쪽의 loss 값이 너무 요동쳐서 이게 맞나 싶네요..

> Train Epoch: [18/50] Step: [0/1875]    G loss: 2.03133 D loss: 0.35493
> Train Epoch: [18/50] Step: [300/1875]  G loss: 1.75953 D loss: 0.32558
> Train Epoch: [18/50] Step: [600/1875]  G loss: 1.76391 D loss: 0.36408
> Train Epoch: [18/50] Step: [900/1875]  G loss: 1.48973 D loss: 0.41981
> Train Epoch: [18/50] Step: [1200/1875] G loss: 1.60073 D loss: 0.34460
> Train Epoch: [18/50] Step: [1500/1875] G loss: 1.31992 D loss: 0.42469
> Train Epoch: [18/50] Step: [1800/1875] G loss: "_*2.10881*_" D loss: 0.32837
> Train Epoch: [19/50] Step: [0/1875]    G loss: 1.85955 D loss: 0.32040
> Train Epoch: [19/50] Step: [300/1875]  G loss: "_*0.80719*_" D loss: 0.46228
> Train Epoch: [19/50] Step: [600/1875]  G loss: 1.34947 D loss: 0.35814
> Train Epoch: [19/50] Step: [900/1875]  G loss: 1.49511 D loss: 0.38920
> Train Epoch: [19/50] Step: [1200/1875] G loss: 1.94805 D loss: 0.40743
> Train Epoch: [19/50] Step: [1500/1875] G loss: 1.57045 D loss: 0.36945
> Train Epoch: [19/50] Step: [1800/1875] G loss: 1.56133 D loss: 0.48576
그렇다고 장기적으로는 줄어드냐 그건 또 아닌 것 같아요..

> Train Epoch: [36/50] Step: [0/1875]    G loss: 1.05121 D loss: 0.46745
> Train Epoch: [36/50] Step: [300/1875]  G loss: "_*2.08556*_" D loss: 0.39854
> Train Epoch: [36/50] Step: [600/1875]  G loss: "_*0.92441*_" D loss: 0.51189
> Train Epoch: [36/50] Step: [900/1875]  G loss: 1.26987 D loss: 0.41959
> Train Epoch: [36/50] Step: [1200/1875] G loss: 1.24341 D loss: 0.43818
> Train Epoch: [36/50] Step: [1500/1875] G loss: 1.67480 D loss: 0.49592
> Train Epoch: [36/50] Step: [1800/1875] G loss: 1.31844 D loss: 0.48288

answers.text:
<@U02T1HLM9NK>
GAN 학습의 non-convergence와 instability는 GAN의 기본적인 특성이면서 동시에 연구 분야기도 합니다.
다음의 글과 논문을 읽어보면 좋을 것 같습니다~
• <https://towardsdatascience.com/what-is-going-on-with-my-gan-13a00b88519e>
• Wasserstein GAN <https://arxiv.org/abs/1701.07875>
• On the Convergence and Robustness of Training GANs with Regularized Optimal Transport <https://proceedings.neurips.cc/paper/2018/file/5a9d8bf5b7a4b35f3110dde8673bdda2-Paper.pdf>
